baslik: Mekanik Bakimda Reaktif Bakimdan Guvenilirlik Merkezli Bakima Gecis
baslik_en: From Reactive Maintenance to Reliability-Centered Maintenance in Mechanical Engineering
ozet: Endustriyel tesislerde reaktif bakim kulturu neden surdurulemezdir? Guvenilirlik merkezli bakim yaklasimina gecis icin temel adimlar, RCM stratejileri ve saha deneyiminden cikarilan dersler.
ozet_en: Why is a reactive maintenance culture unsustainable in industrial facilities? Key steps for transitioning to reliability-centered maintenance, RCM strategies, and lessons from the field.
icerik:
Endustriyel tesislerde mekanik bakim, cogu zaman ariza meydana geldiginde devreye giren bir destek fonksiyonu gibi gorulur. Bir ekipman durur, uretim etkilenir, bakim ekibi sahaya iner, ariza giderilir ve sistem tekrar calisir hale getirilir.

Ancak modern bakim anlayisinda basarili bir bakim organizasyonu yalnizca arizaya hizli mudahale eden yapi degildir. Asil basari, arizalarin tekrarini azaltan, ekipman guvenilirligini artiran, bakim maliyetlerini kontrol altinda tutan ve uretim surekiligini destekleyen bir sistem kurabilmektir.

Reaktif Bakim Neden Uzun Vadede Maliyetlidir?

Bir ariza yalnizca bozulan parcadan ibaret degildir. Sahada bir ekipmani durdurmak; uretim kaybi, kalite riski, is guvenligi riski, plansiz iscilik, acil yedek parca ihtiyaci, dis servis ihtiyaci ve operasyonel stres anlamina gelebilir.

Reaktif bakimin uzun vadede olusturdugu baslica etkiler:
- Plansiz durus sureleri artar
- Bakim ekibinin is plani surekli degisir
- Onleyici bakim faaliyetleri aksayabilir
- Yedek parca tuketimi ongorulenemez hale gelir
- Bakim maliyetleri kontrol edilmesi zor bir yapiya donusebilir

Guvenilirlik Merkezli Bakim Ne Anlama Gelir?

Guvenilirlik merkezli bakim, ekipmanlarin gorevlerini guvenli, verimli ve surdurulebilir sekilde yerine getirmesini hedefleyen sistematik bir yaklasimdir. Bu yaklasimin merkezinde Equipment Reliability yani ekipman guvenirligi vardir.

Reliability Engineering bakis acisinda amac yalnizca arizayi onarmak degildir. Amac; ariza modlarini anlamak, ekipmanin davranisini takip etmek, riskleri onceliklendirmek ve bakim stratejisini bu verilere gore olusturmaktir.

Bakim Ekibinin Rolu Nasil Degisir?

Reaktif bakim kulturunde bakim ekibi genellikle ariza meydana geldikten sonra devreye giren ekip olarak gorulur. Guvenilirlik merkezli bakim kulturunde ise bakim ekibi, uretim surekiliginin ve operasyonel mukemmelliyetin dogrudan parcasidir.

Bu donusumle birlikte:
- Arizayi gideren ekipten, arizanin tekrarini onleyen ekibe gecilir
- Parca degistiren ekipten, ekipman davranisini analiz eden ekibe gecilir
- Acil mudahale eden ekipten, riskleri onceden yoneten ekibe gecilir
- Tecrübeye dayali karar veren ekipten, veri destekli karar veren ekibe gecilir

Temel Yol Haritasi:
- Ekipman kritiklik analizi yapilmalidir
- Ariza ve durus verileri standart sekilde kayit altina alinmalidir
- Tekrar eden arizalar belirlenmeli, RCA yapilmalidir
- MTBF, MTTR ve diger Maintenance KPI gostergeleri takip edilmelidir
- Bakim verileri dijital dashboardlarla gorunur hale getirilmelidir

Sahada gercek olgunluk, ariza oldugunda hizli kosmak degil; ariza olusmadan once dogru sinyali yakalayabilmektir.
icerik_en:
In industrial facilities, mechanical maintenance is often seen as a support function that only kicks in when a breakdown occurs. A machine stops, production is affected, the maintenance team responds, the fault is cleared, and the system is restored to operation.

However, in modern maintenance thinking, a successful maintenance organization is not one that simply responds fast to breakdowns. Real success means building a system that reduces recurrence, increases equipment reliability, controls maintenance costs, and supports production continuity.

Why Is Reactive Maintenance Costly in the Long Run?

A failure is not just a broken part. In the field, an unplanned equipment stop means production loss, quality risk, safety risk, unplanned labor, emergency spare parts, external service needs, and operational stress.

Key impacts of reactive maintenance over time:
- Unplanned downtime increases
- Maintenance schedules are constantly disrupted
- Preventive maintenance activities fall behind
- Spare part consumption becomes unpredictable
- Maintenance costs become difficult to control

What Does Reliability-Centered Maintenance Mean?

Reliability-centered maintenance (RCM) is a systematic approach aimed at ensuring equipment performs its functions safely, efficiently, and sustainably. At its core is Equipment Reliability.

From a Reliability Engineering perspective, the goal is not just to repair failures. It is to understand failure modes, monitor equipment behavior, prioritize risks, and build maintenance strategy based on data.

How Does the Maintenance Team's Role Change?

In a reactive maintenance culture, the team is seen as one that responds after failures occur. In a reliability-centered culture, the maintenance team is a direct part of production continuity and operational excellence.

The transition means moving:
- From a team that fixes failures to one that prevents recurrence
- From replacing parts to analyzing equipment behavior
- From emergency response to proactive risk management
- From experience-based decisions to data-driven decisions

Key Roadmap:
- Conduct equipment criticality analysis
- Record failure and downtime data in a standardized format
- Identify recurring failures and perform RCA
- Track MTBF, MTTR, and other Maintenance KPIs regularly
- Make maintenance data visible through digital dashboards

True maturity in maintenance is not about running fast when a failure happens — it is about catching the right signal before the failure occurs.

baslik_en: How to Build an Effective Preventive Maintenance Plan?
ozet: Etkili bir Preventive Maintenance sisteminin adim adim kurulmasi: ekipman envanteri, kritiklik analizi, bakim periyotlarinin belirlenmesi, EHS entegrasyonu ve KPI takibi.
ozet_en: Step-by-step guide to building an effective Preventive Maintenance system: equipment inventory, criticality analysis, maintenance interval setting, EHS integration, and KPI tracking.
icerik:
Endustriyel tesislerde bakim faaliyetlerinin en onemli amaçlarindan biri, ekipmanlarin beklenmeyen sekilde durmasini onlemektir. Uretim devam ederken bir pompanin, fanin, kompresörün, reduktorun veya kritik bir mekanik sistemin plansiz sekilde devre disi kalmasi yalnizca teknik bir problem degildir.

Onleyici Bakim Neden Sadece Takvim Bazli Olmamalidir?

Bircok bakim plani haftalik, aylik veya yillik periyotlar uzerinden hazirlanir. Ancak sahada her ekipman ayni sartlarda calismaz. Ayni tipte iki motor farkli yukta, farkli cevre kosullarinda ve farkli operasyonel zorlanmalar altinda calisabilir.

Etkili bir bakim plani yalnizca zamana gore degil; ekipman kritikligine, ariza gecmisine, calisma kosullarina ve bakim verilere gore olusturulmalidir.

Birinci Adim: Ekipman Envanteri ve Hiyerarsi

Tesis → Bolum → Sistem → Ana ekipman → Alt ekipman → Kritik parca

Sahada bakim planlarinin zayif kalmasinin en onemli nedenlerinden biri, ekipman hiyerarsisinin dogru kurulmamasidir.

Ikinci Adim: Ekipman Kritiklik Analizi

Her ekipmana ayni bakim yaklasimi uygulanmamalidir. Kritiklik analizi yapilirken dikkate alinmasi gereken kriterler:
- Ekipman durdugunda uretim tamamen duruyor mu?
- Ariza kalite problemine neden oluyor mu?
- Is guvenligi veya cevre riski olusturuyor mu?
- Yedek ekipman var mi?
- Yedek parca temin suresi kritik mi?

Ucuncu Adim: Ariza Gecmisi ve Bakim Verileri

MTBF degerinin dusuk olmasi, ekipmanda bakim stratejisinin gozden gecirilmesi gerektigini gosterebilir. MTTR degerinin yuksek olmasi ise teshis surecinde, yedek parca bulunabilirliginde veya erişilebilirlikte problem oldugunu isaret edebilir.

Onemli Bir Kural:

Sahada en onemli gerceklerden biri sudur: Iyi bir bakim plani, ekipmani sadece durmaktan korumaz; bakim ekibini de surekli acil mudahale baskindan kurtarir.
icerik_en:
One of the key goals of maintenance in industrial facilities is to prevent equipment from stopping unexpectedly. An unplanned shutdown of a pump, fan, compressor, gearbox, or any critical mechanical system during production is not just a technical problem.

Why Preventive Maintenance Should Not Be Calendar-Based Only

Many maintenance plans are built around weekly, monthly, or annual intervals. However, not all equipment operates under the same conditions. Two motors of the same type may run under different loads, different environmental conditions, and different operational stresses.

An effective maintenance plan should be built not just on time intervals, but on equipment criticality, failure history, operating conditions, and maintenance data.

Step 1: Equipment Inventory and Hierarchy

Facility → Department → System → Main Equipment → Sub-Equipment → Critical Part

One of the main reasons maintenance plans remain weak is that the equipment hierarchy is not properly structured.

Step 2: Equipment Criticality Analysis

Not all equipment should receive the same maintenance approach. Key criteria to consider in criticality analysis:
- Does production stop completely when this equipment fails?
- Does a failure cause a quality issue?
- Does it create a safety or environmental risk?
- Is there a standby unit available?
- Is the spare part lead time critical?

Step 3: Failure History and Maintenance Data

A low MTBF value may indicate that the maintenance strategy needs review. A high MTTR value may point to issues in diagnosis, spare part availability, or equipment accessibility.

A Key Rule:

One of the most important field observations is this: A good maintenance plan does not just protect equipment from stopping — it also frees the maintenance team from the constant pressure of emergency response.

baslik_en: Predictive Maintenance: What It Really Means in the Field
ozet: Kestirimci bakim yalnizca olcum almak degildir. Titresim analizi, termal kamera, yag analizi ve ultrasonik kontrollerin dogru yorumlanmasi ve aksiyona donusturulmesi icin kapsamli bir rehber.
ozet_en: Predictive maintenance is not just about taking measurements. A comprehensive guide on correctly interpreting and acting on vibration analysis, thermal imaging, oil analysis, and ultrasonic inspections.
icerik:
Endustriyel tesislerde bakim ekiplerinin en buyuk hedeflerinden biri, ekipman arizalarini uretimi durdurmadan once fark edebilmektir. Cunku sahada bir ekipmani plansiz durdurmak; uretim kaybi, kalite riski, is guvenligi riski, bakim maliyeti ve operasyonel stres anlamina gelir.

Kestirimci bakimin sahadaki gercek karsiligi; veriyi gormek, riski anlamak, dogru zamanda mudahale etmek ve arizayi plansiz durusa donusmeden yonetebilmektir.

Olcum Almak Kestirimci Bakim Degildir

Sahada en sik yapilan hatalardan biri, kestirimci bakimin yalnizca olcum almak olarak gorulmesidir. Oysa olcum, surecin sadece baslangic noktasidir.

Gercek bir kestirimci bakim sistemi su adimlardan olusur:
- Kritik ekipmanlar belirlenir
- Uygun olcum yontemi secilir
- Veriler duzenli toplanir ve trend takibi yapilir
- Alarm seviyeleri ve kabul kriterleri belirlenir
- Riskli durumlar teknik olarak yorumlanir
- Bakim aksiyonu planlanir ve sonucu takip edilir

Titresim Analizi

Bir doner ekipmanda titresim artisi bircok farkli problemin erken gostergesi olabilir: Rulman hasari, kaplin hizasizligi, balanssizilik, gevse baglantılar, mekanik bosluk veya montaj hatasi.

Sahada titresim analizinin en buyuk degeri trend takibindedir. Tek bir olcum yetersizdir. Ekipmani anlamak icin gecmis degerleri, calisma kosullarini ve bakim gecmisini birlikte degerlendirmek gerekir.

Termal Kamera Kontrolleri

Sicaklik artisi bircok problemin gostergesi olabilir: Rulman isinmasi, yaglama yetersizligi, kayin-kasnak problemleri, boru hatlarinda izolasyon kaybi, esanjor performans problemleri.

Termal kameranin en buyuk avantaji, ekipmani durdurmadan kontrol imkani saglamasidir.

Kestirimci Bakimda Veri Kalitesinin Onemi

Kestirimci bakimin basarisi buyuk olcude veri kalitesine baglidir. Yanlis olcum, eksik kayit veya standart disi aciklama, en iyi bakim sistemini bile zayiflatabilir.
icerik_en:
One of the primary goals of maintenance teams in industrial facilities is to detect equipment failures before production is disrupted. An unplanned equipment stop means production loss, quality risk, safety risk, maintenance cost, and operational stress.

The real meaning of predictive maintenance in the field is: seeing the data, understanding the risk, intervening at the right time, and managing the failure before it becomes an unplanned shutdown.

Taking a Measurement Is Not Predictive Maintenance

One of the most common mistakes in the field is viewing predictive maintenance as simply taking measurements. But measurement is only the starting point.

A true predictive maintenance system involves:
- Identifying critical equipment
- Selecting the appropriate measurement method
- Collecting data regularly and tracking trends
- Defining alarm levels and acceptance criteria
- Technically interpreting high-risk conditions
- Planning maintenance actions and following up on results

Vibration Analysis

Increased vibration in rotating equipment can be an early indicator of many problems: bearing damage, coupling misalignment, imbalance, loose connections, mechanical clearance, or assembly errors.

The greatest value of vibration analysis lies in trend monitoring. A single measurement is insufficient. Understanding equipment requires evaluating historical values, operating conditions, and maintenance history together.

Thermal Camera Inspections

Temperature increases can indicate many problems: bearing heating, insufficient lubrication, belt-pulley issues, insulation loss in pipelines, heat exchanger performance degradation.

The key advantage of thermal imaging is that it allows inspection without stopping the equipment.

The Importance of Data Quality in Predictive Maintenance

The success of predictive maintenance largely depends on data quality. Incorrect measurements, incomplete records, or non-standard descriptions can weaken even the best maintenance system.

baslik: RCA: Arizayi Degil, Arizaya Sebep Olan Sistemi Cozmek
baslik_en: RCA: Solving the System That Causes Failures, Not Just the Failure Itself
ozet: Kok Neden Analizi (RCA) neden her bakim organizasyonunun temel aracidirr? 5 Neden Analizi, Balik Kilcigi Diyagrami ve kalici aksiyon yonetimi ile tekrar eden arizalarin sistematik olarak ortadan kaldirilmasi.
ozet_en: Why is Root Cause Analysis (RCA) a fundamental tool for every maintenance organization? Systematic elimination of recurring failures using the 5 Why method, Fishbone Diagram, and permanent corrective action management.
icerik:
Endustriyel tesislerde bakim ekiplerinin sahada en sik karsilastigi durumlardan biri, ayni arizanin farkli zamanlarda tekrar etmesidir. Bir ekipman durur, bakim ekibi mudahale eder, hasarli parca degistirilir, sistem tekrar devreye alinir. Ilk bakista problem cozulmus gibi gorunur. Ancak ayni ariza belirli bir sure sonra tekrar ediyorsa, aslinda yalnizca arizanin sonucu giderilmis demektir.

RCA Nedir?

RCA, bir problemin gorunen sonucundan baslayarak gercek kok nedenine ulasmay hedefleyen sistematik analiz yontemidir. RCA'nin temel sorusu sudur:

'Bu ariza neden oldu ve tekrar olmamasi icin sistemde neyi degistirmeliyiz?'

5 Neden Analizi

RCA calismalarinda en yaygin kullanilan yontemlerden biri 5 Why yani 5 Neden Analizi'dir.

Ornek:
Problem: Bir pompa plansiz durusa neden oldu.
- Neden durdu? Mekanik salmastra hasar gordu.
- Salmastra neden hasar gordu? Pompa belli sure kuru calisti.
- Pompa neden kuru calisti? Emis hattinda yeterli akis olusmaadi.
- Emis hattinda neden yeterli akis olusmaadi? Filtre tikanmisti.
- Filtre neden tikandi? Filtre kontrol ve temizlik periyodu mevcut calisma kosullarina gore yetersizdi.

Sadece salmastra degistirmek arizayi gecici olarak cozer. Ancak filtre kontrol standardi guncellenmezse ayni ariza tekrar edecektir.

RCA'da Insan Hatasi Demek Yeterli Degildir

Sahada RCA calismalarinda yapilan en buyuk hatalardan biri, kok nedeni hizlica 'insan hatasi' olarak tanimlamaktir. Iyi bir RCA calismasi burada durmamalidir. Eger bir hata yapilmissa, sistem bu hataya neden izin verdi diye sorgulanmalidir.

RCA Kulturu Nasil Olusturulur?

RCA kulturunun temelinde su anlayis olmalidir: Suclu arama degil, sistem iyilestirme. Kisisel yorum degil, kanita dayali analiz. Gecici cozum degil, kalici aksiyon.
icerik_en:
One of the most common situations maintenance teams face in industrial facilities is the same failure recurring at different times. Equipment stops, the team responds, the damaged part is replaced, the system is restored. At first glance, the problem seems solved. But if the same failure occurs again after some time, it means only the symptom was resolved — not the root cause.

What Is RCA?

RCA is a systematic analysis method that starts from the visible symptom of a problem and works toward its true root cause. The core question in RCA is:

'Why did this failure occur, and what must we change in the system to prevent it from happening again?'

5 Why Analysis

One of the most widely used methods in RCA is the 5 Why technique.

Example:
Problem: A pump caused an unplanned shutdown.
- Why did it stop? The mechanical seal was damaged.
- Why was the seal damaged? The pump ran dry for a period.
- Why did the pump run dry? Insufficient flow in the suction line.
- Why was there insufficient flow? The filter was clogged.
- Why was the filter clogged? The inspection and cleaning interval was insufficient for the current operating conditions.

Replacing the seal only temporarily resolves the failure. Without updating the filter inspection standard, the same failure will recur.

Saying 'Human Error' in RCA Is Not Enough

One of the biggest mistakes in RCA is quickly labeling the root cause as 'human error.' A proper RCA must go further. If an error occurred, the analysis must ask why the system allowed it to happen.

How to Build an RCA Culture

The foundation of an RCA culture must be: seek system improvement, not blame. Base analysis on evidence, not personal opinion. Pursue permanent corrective actions, not temporary fixes.

baslik: MTBF ve MTTR ile Bakim Performansi Nasil Olculur?
baslik_en: How to Measure Maintenance Performance with MTBF and MTTR?
ozet: MTBF ve MTTR hesaplama yontemleri, dogru yorumlama kriterleri, yaygin hatalar ve bu gostergelerin onleyici bakim plani, RCA ve kestirimci bakim sistemleriyle iliskilendirilmesi.
ozet_en: MTBF and MTTR calculation methods, correct interpretation criteria, common mistakes, and how to link these indicators to preventive maintenance plans, RCA, and predictive maintenance systems.
icerik:
Endustriyel tesislerde bakim performansini degerlendirmek yalnizca 'kac ariza oldu?' veya 'ariza ne kadar surede giderildi?' sorulariyla sinirli degildir.

Bakimda en temel performans gostergeleri MTBF ve MTTR'dir.

MTBF (Mean Time Between Failures): Iki ariza arasindaki ortalama calisma suresini gosterir.
Formul: MTBF = Toplam Calisma Suresi / Ariza Sayisi

MTTR (Mean Time To Repair): Bir arizanin ortalama giderilme suresini gosterir.
Formul: MTTR = Toplam Ariza Durus Suresi / Ariza Sayisi

MTBF ve MTTR Neden Birlikte Degerlendirilmelidir?

- Dusuk MTBF + Yuksek MTTR = Kritik problem
- Dusuk MTBF + Dusuk MTTR = Sik ama hizli cozulen problem (kok neden cozulmemis olabilir)
- Yuksek MTBF + Yuksek MTTR = Seyrek ama zor ariza
- Yuksek MTBF + Dusuk MTTR = Iyi bakim performansi

MTBF Nasil Yorumlanmalidir?

MTBF degerinin dusuk olmasi, ekipmanda tekrar eden problem oldugunu gosterebilir. Ancak bu durum sadece ekipmani kotu anlama gelmez. Bazen bakim plani yetersizdir, bazen operasyon kosullari zorlayicidir, bazen yedek parca kalitesi uygun degildir.

MTTR Nasil Yorumlanmalidir?

Yuksek MTTR onarim surecinin uzadigini gosterir. Bunun nedeni yedek parca eksikligi mi, erisim zorluğu mu, teshis problemi mi, is guvenligi hazirligi mi sorularinin cevaplanmasi gerekir.

Veri Kalitesi Temel Sart

MTBF ve MTTR hesaplari basit gorunur; ancak dogru veri olmadan guvenilir sonuc vermez. Ariza baslangic saati dogru girilmezse, durus suresi yanlis hesaplanir. Bu nedenle bakim veri kalitesi, Maintenance KPI sisteminin temelidir.
icerik_en:
Evaluating maintenance performance in industrial facilities goes beyond simply asking 'how many failures occurred?' or 'how long did it take to fix the failure?'

The most fundamental maintenance performance indicators are MTBF and MTTR.

MTBF (Mean Time Between Failures): Represents the average operating time between two failures.
Formula: MTBF = Total Operating Time / Number of Failures

MTTR (Mean Time To Repair): Represents the average time to resolve a failure.
Formula: MTTR = Total Downtime / Number of Failures

Why MTBF and MTTR Must Be Evaluated Together

- Low MTBF + High MTTR = Critical problem
- Low MTBF + Low MTTR = Frequent but quickly resolved failures (root cause may not be addressed)
- High MTBF + High MTTR = Rare but difficult failures
- High MTBF + Low MTTR = Good maintenance performance

How to Interpret MTBF

A low MTBF value may indicate recurring problems in the equipment. However, this does not necessarily mean the equipment itself is poor. Sometimes the maintenance plan is insufficient, operating conditions are demanding, or spare part quality is not appropriate.

How to Interpret MTTR

A high MTTR indicates prolonged repair processes. The questions to answer are: Is it due to missing spare parts? Difficult access? Diagnostic challenges? Insufficient safety preparation?

Data Quality Is a Prerequisite

MTBF and MTTR calculations look simple, but without accurate data they produce unreliable results. If failure start times are incorrectly entered, downtime is miscalculated. Therefore, maintenance data quality is the foundation of any Maintenance KPI system.

baslik: Zero Breakdown Yaklasimi ve Sifir Ariza Kulturu
baslik_en: Zero Breakdown Approach and Building a Zero-Failure Culture
ozet: Zero Breakdown neden bir hedef degil bir kultursel donusumdu? TPM ve WCM cercevesinde anormallik yonetimi, tag sistemi, 5S ile baglantisi ve sahada sifir ariza kulturunun adim adim olusturulmasi.
ozet_en: Why Zero Breakdown is a cultural transformation, not just a target. Abnormality management, tag systems, and 5S connections within TPM and WCM frameworks — and how to build a zero-failure culture step by step.
icerik:
Endustriyel tesislerde bakim ekiplerinin en buyuk hedeflerinden biri, ekipmanlarin plansiz sekilde durmasini onlemektir. Cunku bir makinenin, pompanin, fanin veya kompresörün beklenmeyen sekilde durmasi yalnizca teknik bir ariza degildir. Ayni zamanda uretim kaybi, kalite riski, is guvenligi riski, bakim maliyeti ve operasyonel stres anlamina gelir.

Zero Breakdown Nedir?

Zero Breakdown, ekipman arizalarini sifira indirmeyi hedefleyen sistematik bakim ve guvenilirlik yaklasimdir. Bu yaklasima gore arizalar cogunlukla bir anda ortaya cikmaz. Ekipmanlar ariza oncesinde sinyal verir:
- Titresim artar
- Sicaklik yükselir
- Yag kacagi baslar
- Baglantilar gevser
- Ses degisir

Bu sinyaller zamaninda fark edilirse ariza plansiz durusa donusmeden yonetilebilir.

Anormallik Kategorileri

1. Abnormality: Ekipmanda fiziksel veya fonksiyonel sapma
2. Contamination: Kirlenme, yag/su/gaz kacagi, korozyon
3. Hard to Access: Kontrol, temizlik veya yaglama yapilmasi zor noktalar
4. Safety: Is guvenligi ile ilgili uygunsuzluklar

Tag Sistemi

Tag sistemi, sahadaki anormallikleri gorunur hale getirmek icin kullanilan etkili bir yontemdir. Her tag'in sorumlusu, termin tarihi, risk seviyesi ve kapanis durumu takip edilmelidir.

5S ve Zero Breakdown Iliskisi

Sahada temizlik yalnizca duzenli gorunmek icin yapilmaz. Temizlik ayni zamanda kontrol faaliyetidir. Bir ekipman temizlendiginde yag kacagi, gevse baglantilar ve mekanik hasarlar daha kolay fark edilir. Bu nedenle Zero Breakdown kulturunde 'temizlik = kontrol' anlayisi temeldir.
icerik_en:
One of the primary goals of maintenance teams in industrial facilities is to prevent equipment from stopping unexpectedly. An unplanned stop of a machine, pump, fan, or compressor is not just a technical failure — it means production loss, quality risk, safety risk, maintenance cost, and operational stress.

What Is Zero Breakdown?

Zero Breakdown is a systematic maintenance and reliability approach aimed at reducing equipment failures to zero. According to this approach, failures rarely occur suddenly. Equipment sends signals before failing:
- Vibration increases
- Temperature rises
- Oil leaks begin
- Connections loosen
- Sounds change

If these signals are detected in time, failures can be managed before they become unplanned shutdowns.

Abnormality Categories

1. Abnormality: Physical or functional deviation from normal equipment condition
2. Contamination: Contamination, oil/water/gas leaks, corrosion
3. Hard to Access: Points that are difficult to inspect, clean, or lubricate
4. Safety: Non-conformances related to occupational health and safety

Tag System

The tag system is an effective method for making field abnormalities visible. Each tag must be tracked with a responsible owner, due date, risk level, and closure status.

5S and Zero Breakdown

In the field, cleaning is not done just to look tidy. Cleaning is also an inspection activity. When equipment is cleaned, oil leaks, loose connections, and mechanical damage become easier to spot. This is why 'cleaning = inspection' is a foundational principle in Zero Breakdown culture.

baslik_en: Mechanical Maintenance Management in Utility Systems
ozet: Kompresörler, pompalar, soğutma sistemleri, fanlar ve basincli hava altyapilarinda guvenilirlik odakli bakim stratejileri. Yardimci isletmelerin neden tesis surekliligi acisindan kritik oldugu ve etkili yonetim yontemleri.
ozet_en: Reliability-focused maintenance strategies for compressors, pumps, cooling systems, fans, and compressed air infrastructure. Why utility systems are critical for facility continuity and effective management methods.
icerik:
Endustriyel tesislerde uretim ekipmanlari genellikle fabrikanin gorunen yuzudur. Ana makineler ve uretim hatlari daha fazla dikkat ceker. Ancak sahada calisan herkes bilir ki uretimin surekliligi yalnizca ana uretim makinelerine bagli degildir.

Bir tesisin kesintisiz, guvenli ve verimli calisabilmesi icin yardimci isletmelerin de guvenilir sekilde calismasi gerekir.

Yardimci Isletmeler Nelerdir?

Yardimci isletmeler, uretim prosesinin dogrudan parcasi olmasa bile uretimin surdurulebilir sekilde devam etmesini saglayan destek sistemleridir:
- Basincli hava sistemleri (kompresörler, kurutucular, filtre gruplari)
- Sogutma suyu ve proses suyu sistemleri
- Pompalar ve hidrofor sistemleri
- Fanlar ve havalandirma sistemleri
- Esanjörler ve chiller sistemleri
- Vakum sistemleri
- Boru hatlari, vanalar ve baglanti ekipmanlari

Bu sistemlerden biri devre disi kaldiginda, dogrudan uretim makinesinde ariza olmamasina ragmen tum tesis etkilenebilir.

Kestirimci Bakim Yardimci Isletmelerde Nasil Uygulanir?

Kompresörlerde sicaklik, basinc, yag kalitesi ve titresim parametrelerinin izlenmesi; sogutucu sistemlerde kondenser performansi ve sogutma kapasitesinin takibi; pompalarda emis-basma basinci ve debi ozelliklerinin duzenli olculmesi kritik oneme sahiptir.

Ultrasonik Kaçak Kontrolu

Ozellikle basincli hava sistemlerinde ultrasonik kaçak kontrolu buyuk onem tasir. Basincli hava kaçaklari cogunlukla sahada gozle gorulmez ve duyulmaz. Ancak enerji maliyetleri uzerinde ciddi etki yaratabilir. Kucuk gibi gorunen bir hava kacagi, uzun vadede ciddi enerji kaybina neden olabilir.
icerik_en:
In industrial facilities, production equipment is usually the visible face of the factory. Main machines and production lines receive the most attention. But everyone who works in the field knows that production continuity does not depend solely on main production machinery.

For a facility to operate continuously, safely, and efficiently, utility systems must also operate reliably.

What Are Utility Systems?

Utility systems are support systems that are not a direct part of the production process but enable sustainable production continuity:
- Compressed air systems (compressors, dryers, filter groups)
- Cooling water and process water systems
- Pumps and pressure booster systems
- Fans and ventilation systems
- Heat exchangers and chiller systems
- Vacuum systems
- Piping, valves, and connection equipment

When one of these systems fails, the entire facility can be affected even if no direct production machine has broken down.

How Is Predictive Maintenance Applied in Utility Systems?

For compressors, monitoring temperature, pressure, oil quality, and vibration parameters is critical. For cooling systems, tracking condenser performance and cooling capacity. For pumps, regularly measuring suction-discharge pressure and flow characteristics.

Ultrasonic Leak Detection

Especially in compressed air systems, ultrasonic leak detection is of great importance. Compressed air leaks are often invisible and inaudible in the field, yet they can have a serious impact on energy costs. A leak that seems minor can cause significant energy loss over time.

baslik: Muteahhit Yonetimi ve Dis Servis Kontrolu
baslik_en: Contractor Management and External Service Control in Maintenance
ozet: Dis hizmet ve muteahhit calismalarinin teknik kalite, EHS uyumu ve operasyonel standartlar acisindan nasil yonetilmesi gerektigini anlatan kapsamli bir rehber. Is izni sistemleri, LOTO ve dogrulama surecleri dahil.
ozet_en: A comprehensive guide on how to manage external services and contractor work from the perspective of technical quality, EHS compliance, and operational standards — including work permit systems, LOTO, and verification processes.
icerik:
Endustriyel tesislerde bakim faaliyetleri yalnizca ic bakim ekibinin yaptigi islerden olusmaz. Ozellikle kompresör servisleri, chiller bakimlari, kaldirma operasyonlari, izolasyon isleri, yasal kontroller ve uzmanlik gerektiren teknik mudahalelerde dis servis ve muteahhit destegi onemli bir yer tutar.

Ancak sahada cok net gorulen bir gercek vardir: Dis servis cagirmak, isi otomatik olarak guvenli ve kaliteli hale getirmez.

Muteahhit Yonetiminin Temel Amaci

Dogru isi, dogru firma ile, dogru kapsamda, dogru zamanda, guvenli ve kaliteli sekilde tamamlamak.

Is Oncesi Yapilmasi Gerekenler

- Is tanimi ve teknik kapsam net olusturulmalidir
- EHS gereklilikleri ve is guvenligi kurallari paylasilmalidir
- Is izni ve LOTO (kilitleme-etiketleme) sureci planlanmalidir
- Kullanilacak ekipman ve malzemelerin uygunlugu dogrulanmalidir
- Risk degerlendirmesi yapilmalidir

Is Sirasinda Yapilmasi Gerekenler

- Saha koordinasyonu ve denetim saglanmalidir
- EHS uyumu anlık kontrol edilmelidir
- Teknik standartlara uyum izlenmelidir

Is Sonrasinda Yapilmasi Gerekenler

- Devreye alma ve test adimlari tamamlanmalidir
- Kalite kontrol ve bakim sonrasi dogrulama yapilmalidir
- Muteahhit performansi kayit altina alinmalidir

Sahada Edilen Temel Ders

Dis servis isi yapabilir; fakat isin dogru, guvenli, standart ve tesis ihtiyacina uygun yapildigini kontrol etmek bakim yonetiminin sorumluluğudur.
icerik_en:
Maintenance activities in industrial facilities are not limited to work performed by internal maintenance teams. External service and contractor support plays a significant role in compressor services, chiller maintenance, lifting operations, insulation work, statutory inspections, and specialized technical interventions.

However, one truth is very clear in the field: Calling an external service does not automatically make the job safe or high-quality.

The Core Objective of Contractor Management

To complete the right job, with the right company, at the right scope, at the right time, safely and with quality.

What Must Be Done Before the Job

- Define the work scope and technical requirements clearly
- Share EHS requirements and safety rules
- Plan the work permit and LOTO (lockout-tagout) process
- Verify the suitability of equipment and materials to be used
- Conduct a risk assessment

What Must Be Done During the Job

- Ensure site coordination and supervision
- Monitor EHS compliance in real time
- Track adherence to technical standards

What Must Be Done After the Job

- Complete commissioning and testing steps
- Perform quality control and post-maintenance verification
- Record contractor performance for future reference

Key Field Lesson

An external service can perform the work — but verifying that the job was done correctly, safely, to standard, and according to facility requirements is the responsibility of maintenance management.

baslik: Bakimda EHS, Risk Azaltma ve Operasyonel Disiplin
baslik_en: EHS, Risk Reduction, and Operational Discipline in Maintenance
ozet: Mekanik bakim operasyonlarinda is guvenligi, risk degerlendirmesi, enerji izolasyonu ve LOTO uygulamalarinin nasil yonetilmesi gerektigine dair kapsamli bir yaklasim. EHS kulturu ve operasyonel disiplinin bakim kalitesiyle iliskisi.
ozet_en: A comprehensive approach to managing occupational safety, risk assessment, energy isolation, and LOTO practices in mechanical maintenance operations. The relationship between EHS culture, operational discipline, and maintenance quality.
icerik:
Endustriyel tesislerde bakim faaliyetleri yalnizca ekipman arizalarini gidermekten ibaret degildir. Mekanik bakim sahasinda yapilan her is; insan guvenligi, uretim surekliligi, ekipman guvenirligi, cevre uyumu ve yasal gereklilikler ile dogrudan iliskilidir.

Sahada edinilen en onemli derslerden biri sudur: Guvenli olmayan bakim, kaliteli bakim degildir.

Bakimda EHS Neden Kritiktir?

Bakim faaliyetleri dogasi geregi bircok riski icinde barindirır:
- Doner ekipmanlar
- Elektrik enerjisi ve basincli sistemler
- Sicak yuzeyler ve buhar hatlari
- Kimyasal temas
- Yuksekte calisma ve dar alan operasyonlari
- Kaldirma operasyonlari
- Muteahhit ve dis servis calismalari

Risk Assessment: Bakim Isinin Baslangic Noktasi

Bir bakim isi baslamadan once tehlikeler belirlenmeli, riskler analiz edilmeli ve kontrol onlemleri tanimlanmalidir.

Enerji Izolasyonu ve LOTO

Kilitleme-etiketleme (LOTO - Lockout/Tagout) uygulamasi, bakim sirasinda ekipmana enerji verilen kazalari onlemek icin kullanilan temel guvenlik onlemidir. Her bakim personeli enerji izolasyonu prosedurunu dogru uygulamalidir.

Is Izni Sistemi

Is izni sistemi, riski yuksek bakim faaliyetlerinin kontrol altinda yapilmasini saglar. Sicak is, yuksekte calisma, dar alan girisi, kaldirma operasyonu gibi faaliyetlerde is izni zorunlu olmalidir.

Sahada gercek basari yalnizca ekipmani calisir hale getirmek degildir: Bunu guvenli, standart, izlenebilir ve tekrarlanabilir sekilde yapabilmektir.
icerik_en:
Maintenance activities in industrial facilities go far beyond fixing equipment failures. Every job performed on the mechanical maintenance floor is directly related to human safety, production continuity, equipment reliability, environmental compliance, and legal requirements.

One of the most important field lessons is: Unsafe maintenance is not quality maintenance.

Why Is EHS Critical in Maintenance?

Maintenance activities inherently carry multiple risks:
- Rotating equipment
- Electrical energy and pressurized systems
- Hot surfaces and steam lines
- Chemical contact
- Working at height and confined space operations
- Lifting operations
- Contractor and external service work

Risk Assessment: The Starting Point of Any Maintenance Job

Before a maintenance job begins, hazards must be identified, risks analyzed, and control measures defined.

Energy Isolation and LOTO

Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) is the fundamental safety measure used to prevent accidents caused by energy being applied to equipment during maintenance. Every maintenance personnel must correctly implement the energy isolation procedure.

Work Permit System

The work permit system ensures that high-risk maintenance activities are conducted under controlled conditions. Work permits should be mandatory for hot work, working at height, confined space entry, and lifting operations.

Real success in the field is not just about restoring equipment to operation — it is about doing so safely, to standard, traceably, and repeatably.

baslik: Bakimda Power BI Kullanimi ve Dijital Dashboard Mantigi
baslik_en: Using Power BI in Maintenance: Digital Dashboard Logic and KPI Visualization
ozet: Bakim verilerinin Power BI ile nasil anlamli hale getirildigi, MTBF-MTTR dashboard tasarimi, ekipman bazli ariza analizi ve dijital bakim yonetiminin pratik uygulamalari.
ozet_en: How to make maintenance data meaningful with Power BI, MTBF-MTTR dashboard design, equipment-based failure analysis, and practical applications of digital maintenance management.
icerik:
Endustriyel tesislerde bakim yonetimi uzun yillar boyunca saha tecrubesi, ariza kayitlari ve kisisel takiplerle yurututldu. Ancak modern bakim organizasyonlarinda yalnizca tecrübeye dayali karar vermek artik yeterli degildir.

Veri Vardir Ama Karar Sistemine Donusmemistir

Bircok tesiste bakim verileri yillarca tutulur. Ancak bu kayitlar duzenli analiz edilmiyor, karar toplantilarinda kullanilmiyor ve bakim planlarina geri besleme saglamiyorsa veri yalnizca arsiv haline gelir.

Power BI Bakimda Ne Saglar?

Power BI, farkli veri kaynaklarindan gelen bilgileri bir araya getirerek analiz edilebilir ve gorsellestirilelebilir hale getirir:
- Ekipman bazli ariza sayisi ve durus suresi
- Aylik MTBF ve MTTR trendi
- En cok ariza yapan ekipmanlar
- Tekrar eden ariza analizi
- Planli ve plansiz bakim karsilastirmasi
- Bakim maliyeti ile durus iliskisi
- RCA gerektiren ekipmanlarin belirlenmesi

Dashboard Tasariminda Kritik Noktalar

Dashboard yalnizca guzel grafiklerden olusan bir rapor olmamalidir. Dogru kurgulanmis bir bakim dashboardu, sahadaki arizayi, durusu, maliyeti ve ekipman guvenilirligini yoneten dijital karar destek sistemidir.

Ancak burada cok onemli bir gercek vardir: Dashboard sadece gorsellestirme aracidir. Asil deger, dashboard uzerinden dogru bakim kararlarinin alinmasidir.

Power BI uzerinde kirmizi gorunen bir ekipman yalnizca raporda kalmamalidir. O ekipman icin bakim plani gozden gecirilmeli, RCA yapilmali ve aksiyon takibi baslatilmalidir.
icerik_en:
Maintenance management in industrial facilities was carried out for many years through field experience, failure records, and personal tracking. However, in modern maintenance organizations, decision-making based solely on experience is no longer sufficient.

Data Exists But Has Not Been Converted Into a Decision System

In many facilities, maintenance data has been recorded for years. But if these records are not regularly analyzed, used in decision meetings, or fed back into maintenance plans, the data simply becomes an archive.

What Does Power BI Provide in Maintenance?

Power BI brings together information from different data sources and makes it analyzable and visual:
- Equipment-based failure count and downtime
- Monthly MTBF and MTTR trends
- Equipment with the highest failure frequency
- Recurring failure analysis
- Planned vs. unplanned maintenance comparison
- Relationship between maintenance cost and downtime
- Identification of equipment requiring RCA

Critical Points in Dashboard Design

A dashboard should not simply be a report made of nice-looking charts. A properly structured maintenance dashboard is a digital decision support system that manages failures, downtime, costs, and equipment reliability in the field.

But one very important truth must be stated: A dashboard is only a visualization tool. The real value lies in making the right maintenance decisions based on what the dashboard shows.

An equipment flagged red on Power BI should not just stay in a report. The maintenance plan should be reviewed, an RCA should be initiated, and action tracking should begin immediately.

baslik_en: From Maintenance Data to Decision Systems
ozet: Bakim verisi nasil anlamli hale getirilir? Ariza kayitlarindan baslayarak CMMS, KPI yapilari ve veri odakli karar mekanizmalarina gecis surecinin pratik ve kapsamli analizi.
ozet_en: How is maintenance data made meaningful? A practical and comprehensive analysis of the transition from failure records to CMMS, KPI structures, and data-driven decision mechanisms.
icerik:
Endustriyel tesislerde bakim ekipleri her gun cok degerli veriler uretir: Ariza kayitlari, durus sureleri, bakim is emirleri, yedek parca tuketimleri, bakim maliyetleri, RCA aksiyonlari ve operatör geri bildirimleri bakim organizasyonunun hafizasini olusturur.

Ancak sahada sik karsilasilan temel problem sudur: Veri vardir, fakat karar sistemine donusmemistir.

Bakim Verisi Ne Olmali?

Bir bakim kaydi sadece gecmiste ne oldugunu gosteriyorsa sinirli deger uretir. Asil deger, bu kaydin gelecekte:
- Hangi ekipmana oncelik verilmesi gerektigini
- Hangi arizanin tekrar ettigini
- Hangi bakim planinin guncellenmesi gerektigini
- Hangi yedek parcanin kritik oldugunu
- Hangi riskin azaltilmasi gerektigini gostermesidir

Veri Kalitesinin Temelleri

MTBF ve MTTR hesaplari dogru veri olmadan guvenilir sonuc vermez:
- Ekipman hiyerarsisi dogru kurulmalidir
- Ariza kayitlari dogru ekipmana baglanmalidir
- Ariza baslangic ve bitis saatleri net olmalidir
- Planli bakim ile plansiz ariza ayirimi yapilmalidir
- Ariza tipi standart siniflandirilmalidir

Karar Sistemine Gecis Adimlar

1. Dogru veri toplamak (garbage in, garbage out prensibi)
2. Veriyi ekipman bazli iliskilendirmek
3. MTBF-MTTR gibi KPI'lari duzenli hesaplamak
4. Power BI dashboard ile gorselllestirmek
5. Dashboard uzerinden aksiyon almak ve takip etmek

Sahada temel ders: Veri toplamak dijitallesme degildir. Gercek dijitallesme, veriyi dogru bakim kararına donusturebilmektir.
icerik_en:
Maintenance teams in industrial facilities generate highly valuable data every day: failure records, downtime, maintenance work orders, spare part consumption, maintenance costs, RCA actions, and operator feedback form the memory of the maintenance organization.

However, the fundamental problem frequently encountered in the field is: Data exists, but it has not been converted into a decision system.

What Should Maintenance Data Do?

If a maintenance record only shows what happened in the past, it produces limited value. The real value is when that record shows:
- Which equipment should be prioritized next
- Which failure is recurring
- Which maintenance plan needs updating
- Which spare parts are critical
- Which risk needs to be reduced

Foundations of Data Quality

MTBF and MTTR calculations cannot produce reliable results without accurate data:
- Equipment hierarchy must be properly structured
- Failure records must be linked to the correct equipment
- Failure start and end times must be clearly documented
- Planned maintenance must be separated from unplanned failures
- Failure types must be standardized in classification

Steps Toward a Decision System

1. Collect accurate data (garbage in, garbage out principle)
2. Link data at the equipment level
3. Regularly calculate KPIs such as MTBF and MTTR
4. Visualize with a Power BI dashboard
5. Take actions based on dashboard insights and track them

Key field lesson: Collecting data is not digitalization. True digitalization is the ability to convert data into the right maintenance decision.

baslik: Bakimda Dogru Veri Olmadan Yapay Zeka Olmaz: Veri Kalitesi, Kodlama ve Standartlastirma
baslik_en: No AI Without Quality Data: Data Quality, Coding, and Standardization in Maintenance
ozet: Yapay zeka destekli bakim sistemlerinin on kosulu neden dogru bakim verisidir? Ariza kodlama standartlari, ekipman hiyerarsisi, kayit disiplini ve veri kalitesinin AI sistemlerine etkisi.
ozet_en: Why is accurate maintenance data the prerequisite for AI-powered maintenance systems? Failure coding standards, equipment hierarchy, record discipline, and the impact of data quality on AI systems.
icerik:
Endustriyel bakim dunyasinda dijitallesme, veri analitigi ve yapay zeka kavramlari her gecen gun daha fazla konusuluyor. Ancak sahada cok net gorulen bir gercek vardir: Yapay zeka, kotu veriyi iyi karara donusturemez.

Bakim veri kalitesi dusukse:
- MTBF ve MTTR yanlis hesaplanir
- Tekrar eden ariza analizi yapılamaz
- Bakim maliyeti yanlis yorumlanir
- Dashboard yaniltir
- Yapay zeka yanlis oneri uretir

Kotu Veri Sahada Nasil Gorunur?

- Ayni ekipman farkli isimlerle kayit edilir
- Ariza aciklamalari cok genel yazilir ('ariza giderildi', 'bakim yapildi')
- Ariza nedeni ile yapilan aksiyon karıstirilir
- Planli bakim ve plansiz ariza ayni kategoriye girer
- Yedek parca tuketimi dogru ekipmana baglanmaz

Standart Ariza Kodlama Sistemi

Her ariza kaydinin en az su bilgileri icermesi gerekir:
- Ekipman kodu
- Ariza tipi (mekanik, elektrik, proses, insan hatasi)
- Ariza nedeni (yaglama, hizasizlik, ask, kirlenme...)
- Yapilan aksiyon
- Sonraki onleyici aksiyon
- Durus baslangic ve bitis saati

Ekipman Hiyerarsisi

Tesis → Bolum → Sistem → Ana Ekipman → Alt Ekipman → Kritik Parca

Hiyerarsisi dogru kurulmamis bir sistemde ariza kayitlari karisir, bakim gecmisi takip edilemez ve KPI analizleri saglikli sonuc vermez.

Sahada temel ders: Bakim verisi dogru degilse, dashboard yaniltir; dashboard yaniltirsa karar yanlis olur; karar yanlis olursa yapay zeka da yanlis yonlendirir.
icerik_en:
Digitalization, data analytics, and artificial intelligence are being discussed more frequently in the industrial maintenance world every day. However, one truth is very clear in the field: Artificial intelligence cannot convert poor data into good decisions.

If maintenance data quality is low:
- MTBF and MTTR are calculated incorrectly
- Recurring failure analysis cannot be performed
- Maintenance costs are misinterpreted
- Dashboards become misleading
- AI produces incorrect recommendations

How Does Poor Data Look in the Field?

- The same equipment is recorded under different names
- Failure descriptions are written too vaguely ('failure resolved', 'maintenance done')
- The failure cause and the action taken are confused
- Planned maintenance and unplanned failures fall into the same category
- Spare part consumption is not linked to the correct equipment

Standard Failure Coding System

Every failure record should contain at minimum:
- Equipment code
- Failure type (mechanical, electrical, process, human error)
- Failure cause (lubrication, misalignment, overload, contamination...)
- Action taken
- Next preventive action
- Downtime start and end time

Equipment Hierarchy

Facility → Department → System → Main Equipment → Sub-Equipment → Critical Part

In a system without a properly structured hierarchy, failure records get mixed up, maintenance history cannot be tracked, and KPI analyses do not produce reliable results.

Key field lesson: If maintenance data is inaccurate, the dashboard misleads; if the dashboard misleads, decisions are wrong; if decisions are wrong, AI will also lead you in the wrong direction.

baslik: Yapay Zeka Destekli Bakim Yonetimi: Gelecegin Bakim Sistemati Nasil Kurulur?
baslik_en: AI-Driven Maintenance Management: How to Build the Maintenance System of the Future?
ozet: Yapay zeka destekli bakim yonetimi nedir, ne degildir? AI'nin bakim organizasyonuna entegrasyonu, hazirlik adimlar, gerekli veri altyapisi ve gercekci beklentiler uzerine kapsamli bir degerlendirme.
ozet_en: What is AI-driven maintenance management and what is it not? A comprehensive evaluation of integrating AI into maintenance organizations, readiness steps, required data infrastructure, and realistic expectations.
icerik:
Endustriyel bakim dunyasi hizli bir donusum surecinden geciyor. Ancak sahada cok net gorulen bir gercek vardir: Yapay zeka, bakim sistemati zayif olan bir tesisi tek basina guvenilir hale getiremez.

Yapay Zeka Bakimda Ne Yapabilir?

- Ariza riski tahmini
- Tekrar eden ariza desenlerinin tespiti
- Kestirimci bakim verilerinin yorumlanmasi
- MTBF ve MTTR trend analizi
- RCA icin olasi kok neden onerileri
- Bakim plani optimizasyonu
- Kritik ekipman risk skoru olusturma
- Yedek parca talep tahmini
- Muteahhit performans analizi

Yapay Zeka Bakimda Ne Yapamaz?

Yapay zeka; saha gercekligini, ekipmana dokunmanin verdigi birikimi, EHS risklerini, operasyonel oncelikleri ve insan kararinin gerektirdigi baglamsal anlayisi yerine geecemez. Bu gercekler bakim muhendislerinin alan bilgisiyle sekillenir.

Hazirlik Adimlar

Yapay zeka destekli bakim yolculugu once sahada gercek degeri arama ile baslar:
1. Dogru veri toplama ve standartlastirma
2. Ekipman hiyerarsisi ve kodlama sisteminin kurulmasi
3. MTBF, MTTR ve Maintenance KPI takibinin hayata gecirilmesi
4. Power BI dashboard ile gorunurluk saglanmasi
5. RCA kulturu ve kalici aksiyon yonetimi
6. Ardından yapay zeka entegrasyonu

Sahada temel ders: Yapay zeka destekli bakimin temeli, sahada dogru veri disiplini ve guclu bakim sistematigidir.
icerik_en:
The industrial maintenance world is undergoing rapid transformation. However, one truth is very clear in the field: Artificial intelligence alone cannot make a facility with a weak maintenance system reliable.

What Can AI Do in Maintenance?

- Failure risk prediction
- Detection of recurring failure patterns
- Interpretation of predictive maintenance data
- MTBF and MTTR trend analysis
- Root cause suggestions for RCA
- Maintenance plan optimization
- Risk scoring for critical equipment
- Spare part demand forecasting
- Contractor performance analysis

What Can AI NOT Do in Maintenance?

AI cannot replace field reality, the knowledge built through hands-on equipment experience, EHS risk assessment, operational priorities, and the contextual understanding that human decision-making requires. These are shaped by the domain knowledge of maintenance engineers.

Readiness Steps

The AI-driven maintenance journey begins by first pursuing real value in the field:
1. Accurate data collection and standardization
2. Establishing equipment hierarchy and coding systems
3. Implementing MTBF, MTTR, and Maintenance KPI tracking
4. Achieving visibility through Power BI dashboards
5. Building RCA culture and permanent corrective action management
6. Only then: AI integration

Key field lesson: The foundation of AI-driven maintenance is correct data discipline and strong maintenance systems in the field.

baslik: Kestirimci Bakimda Yapay Zeka Kullanimi: Sensor Verisinden Ariza Tahminine
baslik_en: AI in Predictive Maintenance: From Sensor Data to Failure Prediction
ozet: Titresim, sicaklik, akim ve basinc sensorlerinden toplanan verilerin makine ogrenmesi algoritmalariyla islenerek ariza oncesi erken uyari sistemleri olusturulmasi ve sahada uygulanabilir AI modellerinin tasarimi.
ozet_en: Building early warning systems by processing vibration, temperature, current, and pressure sensor data with machine learning algorithms — and designing field-applicable AI models for predictive maintenance.
icerik:
Endustriyel tesislerde bakim ekiplerinin en kritik hedeflerinden biri, ekipman arizalarini uretimi durdurmadan once fark edebilmektir.

Kestirimci bakimda yapay zeka kullanimi, sensörlerden, bakim kayitlarindan, ariza gecmisinden ve proses verilerinden gelen verileri birlikte degerlendirerek ariza riskini daha erken, daha sistematik ve daha olculebilir sekilde tahmin etmeye calisir.

Sensor Verisi Neden Onemlidir?

Sahada bircok mekanik ariza bir anda olusmmaz. Ekipman ariza oncesinde cogunlukla kucuk degisiklikler gosterir:
- Titresim artar
- Sicaklik yukselir
- Ses degisir
- Akim dalgalanir
- Basinc duser
- Debi azalir

Bu sinyaller erken asamada yakalanabilirse bakim ekibi arizayi plansiz durusa donusmeden yonetebilir.

Yapay Zeka Modelleri Nasil Calisir?

Temel yaklasim:
1. Ekipmandan sensor verileri toplanir (titresim, sicaklik, akim...)
2. Tarihi ariza ve bakim verileriyle iliski kurulur
3. Normal calisma davranisi ogrenilebilir
4. Sapmalar ve anomaliler algilanir
5. Ariza riski skorlanir ve uyari uretilir

Sahada Onemli Bir Gercek

Yapay zeka burada bakim muhendisinin yerine gecmez. Saha gercekligini, ekipmani calisma sartlarini, EHS risklerini ve operasyonel oncelikleri degerlendiren kisi yine bakim ekibidir. Yapay zeka, bu karar surecini destekleyen analitik bir araçtır.

On Kosul: Kaliteli Veri Altyapisi

Yapay zeka destekli kestirimci bakim icin: Sensörler dogru konumlara yerlestirilen ve kalibre edilmis olmali, veriler standart formatta kaydedilmeli ve bakim kayitlariyla iliskilendirilmeli, ekipman hiyerarsisi net olmali.
icerik_en:
One of the most critical goals of maintenance teams in industrial facilities is to detect equipment failures before production is disrupted.

AI in predictive maintenance works by jointly evaluating data from sensors, maintenance records, failure history, and process parameters to predict failure risk earlier, more systematically, and more measurably.

Why Is Sensor Data Important?

In the field, many mechanical failures do not occur suddenly. Equipment typically shows small changes before failing:
- Vibration increases
- Temperature rises
- Sound changes
- Current fluctuates
- Pressure drops
- Flow rate decreases

If these signals are captured early, the maintenance team can manage the failure before it becomes an unplanned shutdown.

How Do AI Models Work?

The basic approach:
1. Sensor data is collected from equipment (vibration, temperature, current...)
2. Historical failure and maintenance data is correlated
3. Normal operating behavior is learned
4. Deviations and anomalies are detected
5. Failure risk is scored and alerts are generated

An Important Field Reality

AI does not replace the maintenance engineer here. The people who evaluate field realities, equipment operating conditions, EHS risks, and operational priorities are still the maintenance team. AI is an analytical tool that supports this decision-making process.

Prerequisite: Quality Data Infrastructure

For AI-powered predictive maintenance: Sensors must be correctly positioned and calibrated, data must be recorded in a standard format and linked to maintenance records, and the equipment hierarchy must be clearly defined.

baslik: RCA Sureclerinde Yapay Zeka Kullanilabilir mi? Ariza Kok Neden Analizinde Dijital Destek
baslik_en: Can AI Be Used in RCA Processes? Digital Support for Root Cause Analysis
ozet: Yapay zekanin kok neden analizine katkilari nelerdir? Gecmis ariza verilerinin AI ile islenmes, tekrar eden ariza desenleri, kok neden adayi oneri sistemleri ve RCA kulturunun dijital destekle nasil guclendirilecegi.
ozet_en: What contributions can AI make to root cause analysis? Processing historical failure data with AI, recurring failure patterns, root cause candidate suggestion systems, and how to strengthen RCA culture with digital support.
icerik:
Endustriyel tesislerde bakim ekiplerinin en onemli gorevlerinden biri, arizalari yalnizca gidermek degil, ayni arizanin tekrar olusmasini engellemektir.

Geleneksel RCA calismalari buyuk olcude saha tecrubesi, bakim kayitlari, 5 Neden Analizi, Balik Kilcigi Diyagrami ve ekip calısmasıyla yurututur. Bu yontemler hala cok degerlidir.

Ancak bakim verilerinin arttigi ve dijital araclarin yayginlastigi gunumuzde, RCA surecleri dijital destekle daha guclu hale getirilebilir.

Yapay Zeka RCA'da Ne Yapabilir?

Yapay zeka RCA surecinde su konularda destek olabilir:
- Tekrar eden ariza desenleri bulma
- Ariza aciklamalarini siniflandirma
- Benzer gecmis olaylari gosterme
- Olasi kok neden adaylari olusturma
- Bakim aksiyonlarinin etkisini analiz etme
- Kritik ekipmanlarda risk skoru olusturma
- Bakim plani guncelleme onerileri sunma
- Yedek parca tuketimi ile ariza iliskisini gosterme

Yapay Zeka RCA Yapamaz

Yapay zeka, sahadaki muhendislik tecrübesinin yerine gecmez. Ancak dogru veriyle beslendiginde; tekrar eden arizalari bulma, benzer gecmis olaylari gosterme ve olasi kok neden adaylari uretme konusunda bakim ekiplerine guclu bir karar destegi saglayabilir.

On Kosul Gercegi

Doğru veri olmadan yapay zeka destekli RCA mumkun degildir. Ariza kayitlari eksikse, ekipman kodlari hataliysa veya bakim aciklamalari standart degilse, AI sistemleri saglikli oneri ureteeemez.

Bu nedenle yapay zeka destekli bakimin temeli, sahada dogru veri disiplini ve guclu bakim sistematigidir.
icerik_en:
One of the most important duties of maintenance teams in industrial facilities is not just to resolve failures, but to prevent the same failure from occurring again.

Traditional RCA work is largely carried out through field experience, maintenance records, the 5 Why method, Fishbone Diagram, and team collaboration. These methods remain highly valuable.

However, as maintenance data volumes grow and digital tools become more widespread, RCA processes can be made more powerful with digital support.

What Can AI Do in RCA?

AI can provide support in RCA processes in the following areas:
- Finding recurring failure patterns
- Classifying failure descriptions
- Surfacing similar past events
- Generating possible root cause candidates
- Analyzing the effectiveness of maintenance actions
- Creating risk scores for critical equipment
- Suggesting maintenance plan updates
- Showing the relationship between spare part consumption and failures

What AI Cannot Do in RCA

AI cannot replace field engineering experience. However, when fed with accurate data, it can provide maintenance teams with powerful decision support in finding recurring failures, surfacing similar past events, and generating possible root cause candidates.

The Prerequisite Reality

AI-supported RCA is not possible without accurate data. If failure records are incomplete, equipment codes are incorrect, or maintenance descriptions are non-standard, AI systems cannot generate reliable recommendations.

This is why the foundation of AI-driven maintenance is accurate data discipline and strong maintenance systems in the field.
